# Database Schema

## daily_reviews table extended with plan_md, handoff_prompt, plan_status, plan_run_id, plan_error columns for generated plans

[Trigger]: When daily review suggestions support async plan generation that invokes Claude CLI asynchronously. [Detail]: The daily_reviews table was extended with five new columns to track plan generation state: plan_md (TEXT, the generated implementation plan), handoff_prompt (TEXT, the context passed to Claude for plan synthesis), plan_status (TEXT, one of: null|running|done|error), plan_run_id (TEXT, FK to pipeline_runs table), and plan_error (TEXT, error message if plan_status=error). The columns default to NULL and are populated by the background plan generation process. [Consequence]: Existing queries that select * from daily_reviews now include these columns; code must handle NULL values for backward compatibility.

_Source: `src/db/schema.js`_

_Tags: `database`, `schema`_

## Plan-related schema additions use ALTER TABLE IF NOT EXISTS for idempotent migrations

[Trigger]: When adding new columns to existing tables like daily_reviews for plan generation feature. [Detail]: src/db/schema.js uses db.exec('ALTER TABLE daily_reviews ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS plan_md TEXT') for safe evolution. Multiple server restarts do not fail with 'column already exists' errors. [Consequence]: Schema migrations are idempotent and can be safely applied repeatedly without conditional logic in the migration code.

_Source: `src/db/schema.js`_

_Tags: `database`_
